endpoint_address.name: Ollama API Endpoint
endpoint_address.description: The URL of your Ollama server (e.g., http://192.168.1.50:11434/api/generate).

auth_token.name: Authorization Token
auth_token.description: The Bearer token required for API access.

max_concurrent_requests.name: Max Concurrent Requests
max_concurrent_requests.description: How many AI generations can run at the same time.

timeout.name: Request Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds to wait for a response from Ollama.

database_file.name: Database Path
database_file.description: Location of the SQLite buffer database.

log_level.name: Log Level
log_level.description: Detail level of logs (info, debug, warning).

endpoints.name: Buffer Endpoints
endpoints.description: List of AI reply buffers to maintain.

name.name: Endpoint Name
name.description: Unique ID used in your REST commands (e.g., 'weather').

max_buffer_size.name: Max Buffer Size
max_buffer_size.description: How many pre-generated replies to keep in the database.

model.name: AI Model
model.description: The model name as defined in Ollama (e.g., 'llama3').

prompt_for_buffer.name: System Prompt
prompt_for_buffer.description: The instruction used to generate the buffered replies.

maintain_max_buffer.name: Auto-Refill
maintain_max_buffer.description: If enabled, a new reply is generated every time one is consumed.

fallback_replies.name: Fallback Replies
fallback_replies.description: Simple text strings to return if the AI is offline or buffer is empty.
